notices.title: 2026-27 applications are open for School, Intermediate, and B.Tech programs.

notices.title: Document verification desk is open on working days from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
notices.description: Carry marks memo, transfer certificate, Aadhaar, photos, and category certificates if applicable.

notices.title: Final-year placement training batch registration begins at the placement office.
notices.description: Students should register with updated resumes and department mentor approval.
